payload.answer: Update the existing project state: the Brain Slack agent is no longer merely planned/open; its MVP is now implemented.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same Brain Slack agent project and updates its temporal status from planned/open to MVP implemented.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented; this supersedes the prior planned/open status for the Brain Slack agent.

details: Classified as a temporal status transition rather than a contradiction.
Preserved the superseded planned/open status only as historical context, not as current state.
Committed durable memory that the Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.
